name: the-princess-journey
description: Personalized 2D platformer (Kaplay, no build step). This package.json exists ONLY for the dev-time browser test harness; the game itself loads Kaplay from a CDN and needs no install/build.

scripts.test: node tools/test/smoke.mjs && node tools/test/features.mjs && node tools/test/levels.mjs
scripts.test:all: node tools/test/smoke.mjs && node tools/test/features.mjs && node tools/test/levels.mjs && node tools/test/play.mjs
